name: KlipX  X Tips
description: KlipX is a comprehensive social intelligence and transaction utility designed specifically for the X (Twitter) ecosystem. Operating as a modular browser extension, it provides users with an advanced intelligence layer for profile analysis, real-time market sentiment tracking via its proprietary Social Hype Heatmap, and integrated transaction capabilities. The platform facilitates community engagement through a decentralized tipping system and streamlines asset management with a "Quick Trade" interface that connects directly to major decentralized data providers
